channel.title: DJ Danny Hectic B - Updates
channel.description: 30+ years of UK Garage, House, Jungle, Grime. Mixes, events, bookings, and live radio.

item.title: Welcome to DJ Danny Hectic B
item.description: 30+ years in UK Garage, House, Jungle, Grime. Available for club gigs, private events, corporate bookings, radio shows, and more.

item.title: Browse Mixes
item.description: Check out curated mixes and productions from DJ Danny Hectic B

item.description: Find upcoming events and bookings featuring DJ Danny Hectic B
